en: Hamburg pays ten million euros extra for potholes. Snow, ice and frost have clogged Hamburg's streets. Now comes the calculation: The Senate wants to spend an extra ten million euros to repair potholes and repair winter damage. The money should be released quickly.
la: Hamburg decem miliones nummis Europaeis extra potholis solvit. Nix, glacies et gelu viae Hamburgensis plus inhaerent. Iam calculus venit: Senatus extra decem miliones nummorum nummorum ad sartaginem reparandam et damna hiemalia reparanda vult expendere. Pecunia cito dimitti debet.

la: Regula rustica examinatur: "Sancti glacies in tempore" sunt? - Non verum!. Paulo ante Ascensionem Domini, Germania gravem guttam in temperatura sentit. Passim affirmatur hos esse “Sanctos glacies”.  Sednene tempestas phaenomenon vere est an tantum est fabula mediaevalis?
